description: Runner module: merges global config [runners.X] with template directory assets for agent execution (runner.py:1-8)

key_interfaces.name: resolve_runner
key_interfaces.description: Resolve runner by name from global config + template dir, returns dict with command, args, template_dir, start_script, env_template, hooks

key_interfaces.name: render_env
key_interfaces.description: Render .env.example with context dict ({{placeholder}} substitution), overlay .env user overrides

key_interfaces.name: list_runners
key_interfaces.description: List all available runners from global config + user templates + builtin templates

key_interfaces.name: _parse_env_file
key_interfaces.description: Parse a .env file into dict using python-dotenv

key_interfaces.name: _resolve_template_dir
key_interfaces.description: Resolve template directory by name: user_template_dirs > user dir > builtin

key_interfaces.name: _load_template_toml
key_interfaces.description: Load template.toml from a directory, set default hooks

key_interfaces.name: RunnerNotFoundError
key_interfaces.description: Exception raised when runner/template not found

user_flows.name: resolve runner for agent creation
steps: resolve template directory (user dirs > default > builtin)
merge global config overrides (command, args, hooks)

user_flows.name: render environment variables
steps: resolve template dir from name or path
overlay .env from user-scoped dir (for built-in templates)
